title: Quick-Switch
description: A simple mod that makes a keybind [dafault R] that switches to the last selected slot.
body:
## Quick-Switch
- Is a mod that adds a keybind [Default R, can be changed] that when pressed switches to the last selected hotbar slot.
> (If you ever played a Source Engine game [like tf2, hl2, etc.] its basically the "Fast Weapon Switch" thing from the advanced settings menu)
